label: 第153話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 虎杖と伏黒は秤金次の協力を得るため、栃木の立体駐車場で開かれる賭け試合へ潜入する。パンダと合流し、秤へ接触する役割を分担する。
summary_full: 天元から秤金次の居場所を聞いた虎杖と伏黒は、栃木県の立体駐車場跡で開かれる非合法の賭け試合へ向かう。秤は停学中で高専を嫌っているため、二人は制服を脱いで身分を隠す。非術師を観客に呪術師同士を戦わせる興行は呪術規定に反するが、秤へ接触するには内部から信用を得る必要がある。虎杖だけが選手として通され、最初の対戦相手となったパンダと八百長試合を演じる。伏黒は外から別の侵入経路を探す。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Since being suspended from 呪術高専 , 秤金次 has been running an underground fight club between sorcerers . In need of 秤's strength, 悠仁 and 恵 infiltrate the tournament with the goal of asking for help, but must do so without revealing they're students from 呪術高専.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: Before leaving the 薨星宮 , 悠仁 and 恵 got 秤金次's location from 天元様 . 秤 is making money as a bookie for an underground fight club located inside an abandoned parking garage in Tochigi Prefecture. 恵 and 悠仁 are refused at the entrance to the fight club. The fight club pits sorcerers against one another in hand-to-hand combat . The spectators are mostly non-sorcerers, which means 秤 is clearly violating jujutsu regulations article 8 regarding secrecy. 天元 believes there will be curse users among the fighters and warned the boys to be careful. 悠仁 and 恵 reach the parking garage and remove their 呪術高専 uniforms. 悠仁 asks why they're swapping outfits and 恵 clarifies that 秤 is suspended from 呪術高専. He may not associate with them if he realizes they're also students from 呪術高専. It's a gray area where 悠仁 and 恵's allegiance aligns but to 秤 they might as well be with the higher-ups. 悠仁 wonders if 秤 will help even if they go undiscovered and 恵 is unsure given what all their senpai have said about him. Regardless, they need his strength for the 死滅回游 and are going to do their best o recruit him. 恵 and 悠仁 walk into the ground entrance to the abandoned parking garage and are met by a manager and a bodyguard. The security guard tells the kids to get lost before he clobbers them but 恵 refuses to back down. The man throws a strong right hook and stops short right before it hits 恵's face. His hair slightly shifts from the swing, but 恵's eyes stay resolute and he doesn't flinch at all. The security guard pulls back his fist and tells 恵 that rule one is nobody is supposed to say a thing about the club. He demands to know who told 恵 and threatens to beat him up after he spills the info. 恵 confirms 秤 is watching them. 恵 claims not to have gotten the person's name before he killed them. It was a cocky sorcerer that disappeared about a month ago. The manager recalls someone named Kondo disappeared about a month ago but is unable to verify. 恵 asks to take his place and threatens to lay the bodyguard flat if they refuse. 悠仁 realizes what 恵 is doing and decides to stay silent. The manager gets a message from the boss and gets permission to add an additional fighter to today's tournament. However, only on the condition that 悠仁 is selected as the fighter. 恵 claims he has to fight but he's just keeping up an act. He knows 悠仁 is perfectly suited for the job. The manager reveals boss doesn't like 恵 and refuses to let him fight. 恵 looks up at the camera and accepts the condition. 悠仁 meets up with an unexpected ally inside the fight club. The boys leave together and 悠仁 tells 恵 all that bluffing was risky. 恵 disagrees because a fight club using curse users must have frequent turnover. Regardless, they were able to confirm that 秤 is around and watching them through the cameras. The plan is for 悠仁 to look to make contact with 秤 on the inside while 恵 attempts to sneak into the parking garage from the outside. This is risky because the fight club already has their eyes on 恵 and if he gets caught they will distrust 悠仁 as well. If they are discovered, the boys can use force to meet face to face with 秤, but this is an undesirable last resort. They want to come to ask 秤 for help and don't want to do anything that could damage the relationship early. The wisest course of action would be for 恵 to standby for the night while 悠仁 works his way to 秤 on the inside. However, 恵 is anxious and doesn't want to waste any time with 津美紀 's deadline to participate in the 死滅回游 approaching. It's currently 5:00 P.M. on November 10th, leaving their group nine days to rescue 津美紀 before the deadline. It took 悠仁 and 恵 a while to reach Tochigi because transportation from 東京 was scarce and they stopped to exorcise 呪霊 along the way. Confident パンダ will win, 秤 expresses his boredom. That evening, 悠仁 returns to the parking garage and meets with the security guard from early. The man preps 悠仁 by explaining the details of how the tournament works. There are only two rules; no retreating and no jujutsu . 悠仁 is fine with people using cursed techniques against him but non-sorcerers wouldn't be able to see them. The rule against running away is to ensure that the fight takes place where spectators can see. While heading down the stairs towards the arena, 悠仁 recognizes that the fights are all about entraining the spectators and asks what the boss is like. The bodyguard says 悠仁 can only find out if he meets him and continues to explain more about the fights. There are two types of matches; scripted and unscripted ones. The boss fixes the former kind by writing scripts, and putting on a show in an unscripted bout is likely get his attention. 悠仁 and パンダ put on a show while exchanging information. 悠仁 arrives at the fighting area, a section of the garage where the upper floor has been mostly removed. This allows spectators to view the fight from the story above. 悠仁 is introduced to his opponent, someone that surprises everyone when they're first seen. The ガチンコファイトクラブ announcer John☆Bobby begins the tournament by introducing the fighters, the newcomer 虎杖悠仁 against none other than パンダ ! In a monitoring room somewhere in the multistory garage, 秤 sits with his associate as the fight is about to begin. He expresses his displeasure as he believes things are starting to cool off. 秤 doesn't believe there is any fun in knowing who's going to win an unscripted fight. He doesn't think anyone will be able to defeat パンダ and is barely watching. However, his associate points his attention to the television where 悠仁 is proving him wrong in spectacular fashion. 恵 uses the shadows to infiltrate the fight club. 悠仁 and パンダ work together to put on a show that entertains everyone watching. John☆Bobby claims its the best fight he's ever called after only working at the club a few weeks. While they trade fake blows, 悠仁 and パンダ have a conversation to exchange information. パンダ has been allowed into the fight club but 秤 and the other third-year student with him are actively avoiding him. パンダ confirms that 悠仁 is hiding his identity as a student and gives him the signal to finish the fight. 秤 admits things are starting to heat up again. 悠仁 lands a powerful body shot that パンダ sells with an overtop reaction to convince everyone he's been defeated. John☆Bobby calls the fight and 悠仁 is declared the winner, leaving a lasting impression on everyone watching. 秤 admits that he's impressed with 悠仁's ability to fight in three dimensions and dazzle spectators. He calls one of his managers and tells him to bring 悠仁 to his office. He wants to strike while the iron is hot and write scripts for 悠仁's future fights. The other third-year, 星綺羅羅 doesn't see the point and tells 秤 that it sounds dumb. 恵 uses his 術式 to hide in the shadow of the man on the phone with 秤. He eavesdropping on the conversation without anyone noticing, secretly moving through the halls of the fight club. The man on the phone asks 秤 what to do about the other brat, referring to 恵. 秤 plans to have 綺羅羅 keep an eye on him and tells his manager to stay vigilant. 悠仁 has 秤 more thrilled and on edge the old days of his ex-girlfriend and maxing out his credit cards, something 綺羅羅 doesn't appreciate hearing about.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 天元 (回想) 脹相 (回想) 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 John☆Bobby パンダ 秤金次 星綺羅羅
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 vs. パンダ

key_events_verified_phase8: 虎杖と伏黒が秤の賭け試合へ潜入する
高専関係者であることを隠すため制服を脱ぐ
虎杖が選手として内部へ入る
虎杖とパンダが八百長試合を行う
伏黒が別経路から潜入を試みる
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
